nasb.text: So He said, “A nobleman went to a distant country to receive a kingdom for himself, and then return.

esv.text: He said therefore, “A nobleman went into a far country to receive for himself a kingdom and then return.

cnv.text: 說：“有一個貴族往遠方去要接受王位，然後回來。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“有一位贵族要到远方去受封为王，然后返回。

csbs.text: 他说：“有一个出身高贵的人，要往遥远的地方去接受王位，然后再回来。
